intro: I help startups and small teams turn ideas into polished, production-ready web and mobile products — from first wireframe to shipped app.

items.title: Web Applications
items.description: Fast, responsive web apps and sites with React, Vue, Next, Nuxt, and Astro — from landing pages to full dashboards.

items.title: Mobile Apps
items.description: Cross-platform iOS & Android apps with React Native, Flutter, and Expo — built, tested, and shipped to the stores.

items.title: UI/UX & Design
items.description: Clean, usable interfaces and design systems. I bridge design and code so the final build matches the vision.

items.title: APIs & Backend
items.description: Reliable APIs, data models, servers, and CI/CD — Node, Django, databases, and cloud deployment.

process.title: Discovery
process.description: We talk through your goals, scope, and timeline so we're aligned before any code is written.

process.title: Design
process.description: Wireframes and UI so you can see and shape the product early — no surprises later.

process.title: Build
process.description: Iterative development with regular updates. You see progress, give feedback, and stay in the loop.

process.title: Launch & Support
process.description: We ship it live, handle deployment and store submissions, and I'm available for follow-up fixes.
